assets.name: lecture_06_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Clear board shot of the operator-algebra step a^\dagger|n\rangle = c_n|n+1\rangle, legible enough to support the derivation.

assets.name: lecture_06_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Best available reference for the many-mode occupation-number ket and square-root coefficient, though the writing is partially cropped.

assets.name: lecture_06_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Stable, readable board diagram of the boxed basis functions with multiple \psi_n(x) curves and labels.
